use_cases: Toggle boolean settings in forms and preferences panels
Select single items in lists and tables with animated feedback
Capture user consent or agreement in registration flows
Mark tasks or items as complete with visual confirmation
Filter content or search results in dashboards
ai_summary: Berlix Checkbox is an animated checkbox component that draws a stroke-based checkmark using motion/react when toggled. It features customizable size, color, and animation duration, making it a polished, modern replacement for default browser checkboxes. The component is ideal for SaaS dashboards, e-commerce interfaces, and dev-tools that require visually engaging form elements with smooth micro-interactions.
